productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Pack of 3 Brown Socks
description: Pack of three socksIt's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these pairs of ribbed socks from United Colors of  Benetton. A glimpse of these socks from beneath a rolled up pair of jeans adds a hint of eccentricity to your classic style.Made of 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastaneOne pair of plain brown socks with brand name on either side of the foot padOne pair of dark blue socks with brown, blue and cream stripes and brand name on the foot padOne pair cream socks with brown diamond-shaped designs on the leg region and brand name on the footpadSock careMachine wash cold in not more than 30 degreesDo not dry cleanUse non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron
